<!-- generated by sofar — do not hand-edit; truth lives in events.jsonl -->

# Decisions: init-statusline

- 2026-07-12T17:33:18.776Z — chose **sofar init --statusline (informed re-test of felt-cost D4): an opt-in flag merges statusLine {type:command, command:"sofar statusline"} into .claude/settings.json ONLY when the key is absent — an existing statusLine, whatever its value, is the user's and wins; plain init prints a final-output opt-in hint when the project settings lack a statusLine (before the Tailwind scanner hint, which stays last), noting a project statusLine shadows a personal ~/.claude one; sofar uninit removes the entry only when it is exactly the one --statusline installs** over Auto-installing by default (D4's rejected clobber — a project statusLine silently shadows the user's personal statusline in every inited repo), hint-only (leaves the hand-edit friction that prompted the report), or wiring via doctor --fix (wiring belongs to init/uninit; doctor --fix is scoped to the scanner repair) because D4 rejected AUTO-install, not installation via init: an explicit flag is user consent, so nothing is clobbered unasked. Merge-only-when-absent + theirs-wins matches the .mcp.json/.gitattributes customized-entry precedent, and the hint fixes discoverability exactly the way the Tailwind hint does (user report Jul 12: statusline missing in other repos after init).
